text: Hello everybody! I'm in the mood for coffee, so let's go to a cafe together.
At this cafe, you can place your order using a kiosk, so you don't even have to talk to a barista here.
Let's look at the menu. They even have an English option.
I usually like to eat in, but today I have to go back to work, so I'll do takeaway or takeout.
Usually in the mornings I go for black coffee, but in the afternoons I like something a little bit sweet, so my go-to drink is an ice latte.
I'm also trying to cut back on caffeine, so I'll go for decaf.
A decaf vanilla latte sounds great.
Wow, it is so customizable here. You can add an extra shot of espresso or popping cream, which I'm guessing is whipped cream.
I don't drink regular milk, so I'll choose the non-dairy option, which is oat milk.
And I'll add it to my cards. I'm ready to pay, so I'll place my order. No, thank you. I'm all set.
So this is my bill, and I will pay with my husband's card.
This is a tip. You can bring your husband's card. I don't have a loyalty card here, so I cannot earn points.
So I'll skip that. I'll pay with credit card. I'll scan my card.
I've got my receipts and my order number, so I'll wait for my coffee to be prepared. Korean cafes are the best.
They even have a photo zone at the cafe. So I'll take a picture while I wait for my coffee. They have props here too.
How do I look? Cool? I think I finished just in time. My coffee is ready.
Alright, looking good. Maybe I'll hang it on the wall. I'll try not to cover other people.
Tada! Now, I'll head to the counter to pick up my coffee.
I've got my coffee, and I'm going to use a sleeve, so my hands don't get too cold.
I'll also grab a straw, and some cafes even have bottles of syrup, so you can pump extra sweetener into your drink.
This one doesn't have a cure. If you have more than one drink, you can always ask for a carrier as well.
But I only have one coffee, so I don't need a carrier today.
Now, it's the best part. I can finally drink my coffee, so I will take off the lid and stir the coffee and milk with my straw.
It's better when it's well mixed. After mixing it, I'll put the lid back on and take my first sip.
Hmm, fire. This is going to give me the energy I need for work.
Thank you, everybody, for grabbing coffee with me today. If you like this video, make sure to subscribe to our channel, like and let me know in the comments where you want me to go next.
